overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking down a rain-soaked neon-lit city street at night, approaching and interacting with a police car, exploring a trash-filled alleyway, and returning to the street. The scene features characteristic cyberpunk aesthetics with holographic billboards, flashing police lights, and atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy neon-lit city sidewalk with holographic billboards

events.description: pedestrian in red jacket walks past on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking down the wet sidewalk toward a distant police car and holographic billboards

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket and white cap walking past the camera

entered.detail: large floating digital advertisements displaying colorful anime-style characters
teal painted wall covered in white and red graffiti tags
tall pole with bright overhead light illuminating the rain
futuristic police vehicle parked on the sidewalk with emergency lights
black metal barrier separating sidewalk from street
dark skyscrapers with illuminated windows forming the city canyon

segments.scene_description: The player walks down a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night, passing a pedestrian in a red jacket. Holographic billboards float above the street casting colorful neon light, while a police car waits ahead on the right sidewalk. Tall buildings line the left side creating an urban canyon effect.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching police checkpoint with neon storefront

agents.ego_description: approaching the parked police car and the alley entrance beside it

notable_agents.action: police car with flashing red and blue emergency lights parked on the sidewalk

entered.detail: green neon sign for Electroware store above the alley entrance
dark opening between buildings leading to a back alley

segments.scene_description: The player gets closer to the police car which dominates the right side of the frame with its flashing emergency lights. The Electroware neon sign becomes visible above a dark alley entrance, while the graffiti wall and distant skyscrapers fade from view as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: trash-filled back alley with holographic advertisement screen

events.description: interaction prompt appears indicating option to break into the police car
moving past the police car into the narrow alleyway

agents.ego_description: attempting to break into the police car then proceeding into the narrow alley

notable_agents.action: police car with driver side door open and emergency lights flashing

entered.detail: metal sliding gate partially open at the alley entrance
massive digital billboard at alley end displaying All Night Every Night
scattered garbage and debris covering the wet alley floor
red and white striped concrete blocks lining the alley entrance

segments.scene_description: The player attempts to interact with the police car as a break-in prompt appears, then moves past the vehicle into a narrow trash-filled alley. The environment shifts from the open street to a sheltered corridor with a large holographic screen at the far end and concrete barriers lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: exiting the alley back to main street

events.description: turning around 180 degrees to exit the alleyway
exiting the alley and returning to the main sidewalk

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking back out of the alley toward the main street

entered.detail: large floating digital advertisements visible again as exiting the alley
tall street light coming back into view

segments.scene_description: The player turns around in the alley, causing the concrete barriers to shift from right to left in the frame, then walks back out past the police car toward the main street. The holographic billboards and street lamps reappear as the camera exits the narrow alley and returns to the open sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, neon-lit city street into a claustrophobic alleyway and back again. It begins by moving down a rain-soaked urban canyon beneath floating holographic billboards, passing a pedestrian in a red jacket toward a police car parked on the sidewalk. As the camera approaches the vehicle, the flashing emergency lights dominate the frame and the scene shifts toward a dark alley entrance marked by an Electroware neon sign. The perspective then pushes past the police car and enters the narrow, trash-filled corridor, where the open street is replaced by concrete barriers and a distant holographic screen. Finally, the camera pivots within the alley and retreats past the police car, returning to the open sidewalk as the colorful billboards and street lamps reappear.
